raw: {"weights":{"R1.1":0.3,"R1.2":0.7,"R1.3":0.7,"R1.4":0.3,"R1.5":0.3,"R1.6":0.7,"R1.7":0.3,"RX.1":1.0,"RX.2":1.0,"RX.3":1.0,"RX.4":1.0,"RX.5":1.0},"active_set":["R1.2","R1.3","R1.6","RX.1","RX.2","RX.3","RX.4","RX.5"],"category_focus":"R1","clarification_needed":false,"clarification_question":"","rationale":{"R1.2":"A generic request to check this draft centrally includes detecting internal contradictions in the argument, especially between full inductivity and learned per-node embeddings.","R1.3":"The checker is expected to assess whether reported empirical claims and explanations are supported by the stated evaluation setup and results.","R1.6":"A broad check of a paper passage normally includes sentence-level clarity, flow, and precision.","RX.1":"The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is terse and the artifact gives limited context.","RX.2":"The checker must avoid accepting or amplifying claims that exceed what the artifact establishes.","RX.3":"The responsibility is limited to checking the supplied research-writing artifact, not executing edits or external validation.","RX.4":"Misleading technical claims about inductive generalization or benchmark results could create downstream research harm.","RX.5":"Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact text."}}

rationale.R1.2: A generic request to check this draft centrally includes detecting internal contradictions in the argument, especially between full inductivity and learned per-node embeddings.
rationale.R1.3: The checker is expected to assess whether reported empirical claims and explanations are supported by the stated evaluation setup and results.
rationale.R1.6: A broad check of a paper passage normally includes sentence-level clarity, flow, and precision.
rationale.RX.1: The projection must preserve uncertainty because the delegation is terse and the artifact gives limited context.
rationale.RX.2: The checker must avoid accepting or amplifying claims that exceed what the artifact establishes.
rationale.RX.3: The responsibility is limited to checking the supplied research-writing artifact, not executing edits or external validation.
rationale.RX.4: Misleading technical claims about inductive generalization or benchmark results could create downstream research harm.
rationale.RX.5: Any projected responsibility should remain traceable to the delegation wording and the artifact text.
